message:
Delete redundant test files, expand CI test coverage

Remove basic.mjs (subsumed by phase1) and phase3.mjs (tests native
JSON.stringify). Add Uint8Array test to phase1, add phase2 streaming
tests to CI script. Condense toJSON() cache from boolean+variable to
Symbol sentinel.

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
     "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -O3 dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
     "build:js": "bun x tsc",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:js",
-    "test": "bun test/basic.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs",
+    "test": "bun test/phase1.mjs && bun test/phase2.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs",
     "bench": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:parse": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:e2e": "bun --expose-gc bench/end-to-end.mjs",
